action.reasoning: Observation: v3 crashed due to scheduler mismatch after unfreezing. Best test=0.6023 (dual frozen). Analysis: Frozen backbones generalize best. Need better class weighting for rare classes. Decision: Extract features offline, train MLP with aggressive class weighting and regularization. This is faster and avoids any backbone overfitting risk.
action.command: python extract_features.py && python train_mlp.py && python train_v4.py
